title: [cross-impl] synchronized_hop_channel seed encoding and schedule vs on-the-fly mismatch
description: Python node.py:96 uses seed.to_bytes(8,"big") + (sfn+i).to_bytes(4,"little") for hop_schedule precompute; tdma.py:16 uses seed.to_bytes(4,"little") + sfn.to_bytes(4,"little"). New synchronized_hop_channel() in node.py:142 (from 798f2fac5) uses schedule but validate_vector uses tdma func. Vectors in ccp16-hop.json expect specific hash_32(FNV) results per spec/02a:120. Rust lichen_hash_32 matches Python hash but no unified select_channel impl. Zephyr C lichen_hash_32 must match. Different behavior for same CCP-12 algo. See test/vectors/generate.py:1750 and ccp16-hop.json:7. Priority 1 for interop.
